Why Puff Paradise

The Forney Favorite

From unbeatable selection to extended hours, here's what sets us apart from the rest.

Hottest Flavors in Stock

We always keep the latest and most popular vape flavors stocked and ready — no waiting for what's trending.

Top Brands & Wide Selection

Shop the industry's leading brands curated for quality and variety. If it's popular, we carry it.

Great Vibes & Expert Staff

Our friendly, knowledgeable team creates a welcoming atmosphere and helps you find exactly what you need.

Open 9 AM – 10 PM Daily

Extended hours seven days a week so we're here when you need us — morning, afternoon, or evening.

What We Carry

Products & Services

From the latest vape flavors to smoking accessories and wellness products — all under one roof in Forney.

Vapes & E-Cigarettes

The latest vaping devices and flavors, including the hottest Lost Mary products. We keep our shelves stocked with what's new and what's popular.

Kratom Products

Quality kratom for your wellness needs. Our knowledgeable staff can help you understand the options and find the right fit.

Hemp & CBD

A curated selection of hemp-derived CBD products from trusted brands. Explore natural wellness solutions with guidance from our team.

Smoking Supplies

Pipes, papers, wraps, lighters, and all the accessories you need. Everything in one convenient location.

Top Industry Brands

We handpick the most respected and popular brands in the industry so you can shop with confidence every visit.

Expert Guidance

Our knowledgeable staff are always ready to answer questions and point you toward the products that best fit your needs.

What Customers Say

The Community Loves Us

Ready to Visit Puff Paradise?

Stop by our store on FM 548 in Forney, TX. We're open daily from 9 AM to 10 PM and ready to help you find exactly what you're looking for.
